name: Transformers: War for Cybertron
post_apply_message: TWFC — intros skipped (6 .bik files renamed to .gfm-orig, revertible). FPS unlock is NOT available: Psych's trainer runs under Proton but Wine's low-level keyboard hook (WH_KEYBOARD_LL) doesn't deliver Numpad 0 to it while the game has input focus — confirmed 2026-07-07. Game plays at its stock 30 FPS. If you cleaned up an earlier apply, delete ~/TWFC_Unlocker and ~/gfm-wrappers/twfc.sh, and clear the Steam launch options manually.
notes: Intro-skip only recipe. FPS trainer removed after Deck test: Psych's 2010 trainer attaches and runs visibly under Proton, but Numpad 0 never reaches it (WH_KEYBOARD_LL hook delivery through Wine while game has focus — a long-standing Wine wart). Trainer + wrapper payloads still in git history if anyone finds a working delivery path or writes a static exe patch. Bink filenames from PCGamingWiki (TransGame/Movies/); Linux is case-sensitive so if any filename doesn't match on the actual install, that remove_files line silently no-ops. Game is delisted; Steam appid 42650.
